description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text says the Department of War has released the first tranche of UFO/UAP files to the public, references transparency and previous administrations, quotes 'WHAT THE HELL IS GOING ON?', and is signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP', followed by a 'war.gov/UFO' link.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; the Department of War has released the first tranche of the UFO/UAP files; war.gov/UFO
